Empty watchlist: 0 candidates. NOTABLE: this run executed mid-session (~12:38 PM ET / 16:38 UTC), not pre-open, yet rel_vol still rejects every symbol. Prior agents recommended re-running later so current-day volume accumulates -- that did not help. This confirms the empty watchlist is structural, not a timing issue: rel_vol = today cumulative daily-bar volume / prior full-day volume can rarely exceed 1.5x intraday on the IEX feed, and the gap-up gate compounds it. Recommend a maintenance fix to premarket_scan.py (e.g. use minute-bar relative volume vs. time-of-day baseline, or relax the rel_vol/gap thresholds) rather than re-running. weekly_observations: Zero trades for the second consecutive bootstrap week: every premarket scan returned an empty watchlist (0 candidates), so the strategy never fired and Bull sat in cash through a calm, mildly risk-on week (VIX ~15.4-15.9, SPY trending up +1.54%) -- the entire -1.54% relative shortfall is opportunity cost, not bad trades. The root cause is confirmed structural and NOT a timing issue: a mid-session re-run (~12:38 PM ET) still produced 0 candidates because premarket_scan.py computes IEX-feed rel_vol as today cumulative daily-bar volume / prior full-day volume, which almost never clears the 1.5x gate intraday, compounded by the gap-up >=2% requirement. Top priority for next Monday is a maintenance/code session on premarket_scan.py (minute-bar rel_vol vs a time-of-day baseline, or relaxed rel_vol/gap thresholds) before any parameter tuning -- there is no point analyzing signals until at least one trade exists. Also note daily_pnl.json and EOD journal entries were never written this week; equity is unchanged at $100k. Fixed a ClickUp bug (hardcoded status "open" -> CRTSK_001) so reports now post.

Fixed the long-standing premarket scan issues (committed to master, cd2cf02). TWO fixes: (1) discover_stocks_by_news now retries up to 4x on Perplexity refusals/empty responses and strips placeholder tickers the model echoes from the prompt example — previously a single intermittent refusal produced an empty watchlist; (2) validate_candidates now filters on 20-day AVERAGE daily volume and the most recent daily CLOSE, instead of a single noisy IEX snapshot day and the unreliable (~2x inflated) latest_trade price. Also relaxed config: MIN_AVG_VOLUME 500k->100k (Alpaca IEX feed only reports a fraction of consolidated volume, so the old threshold was mismatched and rejected liquid names) and PRICE_MAX 500->1000. Dry run at ~1:30 PM ET produced 20 validated candidates (NVDA, MSFT, AMZN, META, GOOGL, AVGO, TSLA, NFLX, AMD, ARM, ORCL, CRM, NOW, STX, BE, ASX, APP, CRDO, CIFR, WULF) from 25 discovered, dropping only genuine micro-caps. All 36 tests pass. IMPLICATION: the recurring "scan returns empty/thin, CODE FIX NEEDED" guidance in earlier journals is now RESOLVED — an empty watchlist going forward indicates a real problem (API outage, market-wide), not the known structural bug.
